name: kimi-rules-userprompt-inform
doc: Rules-scope UserPromptSubmit under kimi: the injection goes through renderInform (runtime/inform.ts) — raw rule text on stdout (Kimi appends it to context), NEVER the Claude-shaped hookSpecificOutput envelope the other harnesses consume. The rules root resolves dynamically (rules-root.ts): no CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/KIMI_PLUGIN_ROOT in the scrubbed sim env, no managed kimi plugin -> cwd fallback, whose rules/ dir the setup materializes.

steps.doc: UserPromptSubmit -> injectRules(resolveRulesRoot) -> renderInform kimi branch -> raw text, no JSON.
